'''Arbran IV''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]] in the [[Arbran system]]. A [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]],<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> it was located in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arbran IV was mentioned in "Hole in the Ground," the first article in the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]'', written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] as a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The article was published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[June 5]], [[2003]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Arbran [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Arbran IV, in grid square N-17.<ref name="TEA" />
